prompts: Cinematic medium shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm ambient lighting. Ari Ironleaf, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf-shaped brooch, firmly steadies a damaged metal shield on a wooden workbench. Beside them, Ari Mistfell, an androgynous crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron and brass tool belt, carefully guides a repair tool across the shield surface. Cooperative teamwork, detailed textures, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous cinematic shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge. Ari Mistfell, the crafter with ash-smudged gloves, taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Ari Ironleaf, the ranger, maintains a steady, supportive grip on the shield's edge. Warm forge glow, friendly and focused expressions, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
